Dan Martin the Irish man attacks and takes his teammate yakob fuguang third in the overall ranking with him under the burning Sun the Danish leaves Dan Martin behind and takes off for a solitary run behind Richie Port tries to catch up in the manner of a time trialist he reels in most of his Rivals but 3 kmet from the Finish Line fugang still has a lead of 1 minute and 15 seconds and that's the time Port needs to beat for fuglesang the stage win his second on the 69th Edition is certain but he gives it all with hopes to a more than unexpected race win port won't make it and the former mountain biker fugang can Rejoice it's the first success on the road race since the Danish joined estana and after the Crum fugang has proven that he'll have to be reckoned with on the tour to fronts the suspense couldn't have been greater today on the plateau de Solon and the final kilometer must have seemed endless to Richie port a bit sooner yakob fuguang had taken the lead passing the line with a 10-second bonus and the Australian had 1 minute and 4 seconds to beat him but it wasn't enough for Port a final showdown worthy of the Dual lemon feno at the tour to France 89 because the two men offered us a virtual time trial on the final Ascent a duel where the Danish from Team Asana emerged Victorious oh amazing uh know what to say of course we tried to to keep our GC was the plan of fry had to pull after Fabio he went so hard uh in the end that the Daniel Martin attacked and I just I just followed I tried to keep uh keep cool the whole day and uh without without even pushing it too much he uh he dropped on the flat and then it was all for the for the stage to start with and uh yeah and then we got it all last Friday at lotex had won by a hair today yakob fugang stage win couldn't have been clearer the Criterium once again offered the breathtaking final last year only 12 seconds stood between Roman Bard and winner Chris Frum this year it's even closer fugang wins by 10 seconds only just like in 2016 Den Martin finish a third 1 second ahead of Chris room
